name: Cipolle Arrositite (Roast Onions)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Do not peel the onions. Rub the outer skins well with the olive oil.
3. Set them in an oiled baking pan, sprinkle with salt and pepper.
4. Bake for about 1 hour until soft and golden.
5. Serve warm or at room temperature. Use either as a side dish or as part of an antipasto.
6. Toss with fresh herbs such as oregano and serve as part of a salad.
